$comment: v1 — an Arms (combat) class, VILLAGER-AND-GODHEAD-SPEC Part I §1-2. Villagers train into these at a Drill-Yard (work-drill-yard); talents ignite at levels 3/6/9, same rhythm as the player's Six Virtues (virtue.schema.json). Trade classes (npc-class.schema.json) are a separate track and do NOT level.

primaries.description: stat names this class's primaryPerLevelPct buffs, e.g. ['melee-dmg','block']

hpPerLevelPct.description: per-level max-HP bonus, %; EA baseline lives in tuning/villagers.json — this is per-class documentation/override headroom

primaryPerLevelPct.description: per-level bonus to this class's primaries, %; EA baseline lives in tuning/villagers.json

requires.description: training prerequisites (village_system.train_arms enforces these); omit for no gate

behavior.description: road-party AI parameters; presentation (villager.gd) reads these later — three params per class, no behavior trees

engageRange.description: meters at which this class engages aggro

breakHpPct.description: HP fraction at which the villager breaks and runs to the player

holdGround.description: stands where placed rather than kiting/repositioning
